dotCMS-dev.name: dotcms-container
commands: docker compose exec -u 0 dotcms bash -lc "clear && echo 'Inside dotCMS docker container' && echo '  # You are now running as root' && exec bash"

dotCMS-dev.name: Docker-Compose DotCMS
commands: bash -lc "cd /mnt/c/Repos/DotCMS && clear && echo 'Run when ready:' && echo '  docker compose logs dotcms -f --tail=10' && echo '  docker compose up -d' && exec bash"

dotCMS-dev.name: Developer Browser
commands: Clear-Host; Write-Host 'Developer Web Browser Session'; Write-Host 'Run when ready:'; Write-Host '  npm run start' -ForegroundColor Cyan

dotCMS-dev.name: DNN to DotCMS Migration
commands: Clear-Host; Write-Host 'DNN to DotCMS Migration Session'; Write-Host 'Run when ready:'; Write-Host '  dotnet run --project DnnToDotCms -- dnn_export/2026-03-29_01-49-26 --output test-site.tar.gz' -ForegroundColor Blue; Write-Host '  git pull origin main' -ForegroundColor Yellow

emailScript-dev.name: Workspace DotCMS
commands: bash -lc "cd /mnt/c/Repos/DotCMS/dotcms-workspace && clear && echo 'Run when ready:' && echo '  ./update-local.sh --overwrite' && echo '  ./update-local.sh --pull' && exec bash"

emailScript-dev.name: demo-emailScript
commands: bash -lc "cd /mnt/c/Repos/DotCMS && clear && echo 'Email Script Dev Session' && echo 'Run when ready:' && echo '  ls -la' && echo '  # (replace with your email script command)' && exec bash"

emailScript-dev.name: plugin:Results
commands: bash -lc "cd /mnt/c/Repos/DotCMS/dev/plugin-seeds/com.fis.formresults && clear && echo 'Run when ready:' && echo '  mvn -DskipTests clean package' && exec bash"

emailScript-dev.name: plugin:Endpoint
commands: bash -lc "cd /mnt/c/Repos/DotCMS/dev/plugin-seeds/com.fis.formendpoint && clear && echo 'Run when ready:' && echo '  mvn -DskipTests clean package' && exec bash"

emailScript-dev.name: build-tools
commands: bash -lc "cd /mnt/c/Repos/DotCMS/dev/dotcms-dev-workspace/build-tools && clear && echo 'Run when ready:' && echo '  npm run build' && exec bash"
